query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `chain_jobs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `chainId` int NOT NULL,
  `jobId` int NOT NULL,
  `position` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `chain_jobs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `job_chains` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100),
  `status` enum('planned','active','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'planned',
  `totalEarnings` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `totalCosts` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `totalNetProfit` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `totalDurationMins` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `totalDistanceMiles` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `profitPerHour` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `riskFlags` json,
  `repositionLegs` json,
  `shareToken` varchar(64),
  `shareExpiresAt` timestamp NULL,
  `scheduledDate` timestamp NULL,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `job_chains_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `job_chains_shareToken_unique` UNIQUE(`shareToken`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `jobs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('planned','active','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'planned',
  `pickupPostcode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `dropoffPostcode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `deliveryFee` decimal(8,2) NOT NULL,
  `fuelDeposit` decimal(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `brokerFeePercent` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `brokerFeeFixed` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `fuelReimbursed` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `estimatedDistanceMiles` decimal(8,2),
  `estimatedDurationMins` decimal(8,2),
  `estimatedFuelCost` decimal(8,2),
  `estimatedFuelPricePerLitre` decimal(6,4),
  `estimatedWearTear` decimal(8,2),
  `estimatedTimeValue` decimal(8,2),
  `estimatedNetProfit` decimal(10,2),
  `estimatedProfitPerHour` decimal(8,2),
  `estimatedProfitPerMile` decimal(8,4),
  `worthItScore` enum('green','amber','red'),
  `actualDistanceMiles` decimal(8,2),
  `actualDurationMins` decimal(8,2),
  `actualFuelCost` decimal(8,2),
  `actualNetProfit` decimal(10,2),
  `actualNotes` text,
  `routeData` json,
  `scheduledPickupAt` timestamp NULL,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `jobs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_settings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `vehicleMpg` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 35,
  `fuelType` enum('petrol','diesel') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'petrol',
  `hourlyRate` decimal(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 15,
  `wearTearPerMile` decimal(5,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.15,
  `defaultBrokerFeePercent` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `riskBufferPercent` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `enableTimeValue` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `enableWearTear` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `homePostcode` varchar(10),
  `alertsEnabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `user_settings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_settings_userId_unique` UNIQUE(`userId`)
);
